provenance.note: P2-v2 remediation of P2: N raised to 3600 (0/10 scene-invalid in calibration) and a coverage-aware confirmatory denominator (floor V>=18, >=80% of valid per hypothesis). Gates by the midpoint rule. Deterministic; re-running p2_v2_2plus1d --stage a at aee54e0 reproduces them. Do not edit after freezing.
